body.title: [triage] PENDING-VALIDATION needs a CLOCK, an OWNER, and AUTO-DEMOTION — a state with no mechanism is shipped-unproven with a comfortable name
body.intention: I intend that a long-running validation RESOLVES ITSELF — that at its horizon it either produced the discriminating event or auto-demotes to shipped-unproven — so that PENDING-VALIDATION can never become the parking spot it was invented to prevent.
body.description:
**⚠ RE-SCOPED 2026-07-13 (Fable review; Akien: 'i agree with fable'). The schema half stands. The STATE half was half-invented and is now fixed.**

**THE BLUNT FINDING.** CC proposed PENDING-VALIDATION as a third status (proof named, running, horizon known) distinct from `shipped-unproven` (no known proof method) and `proven`. The DISTINCTION is real — collapsing them punishes the better epistemic situation. But as specified, PENDING-VALIDATION was **a LABEL, not a MECHANISM**: everything CC listed (proof named, horizon named, falsifier named) is METADATA ON shipped-unproven. A new state earns its existence only if it BEHAVES differently. Without behaviour it is shipped-unproven with a more comfortable name — which is the parking-spot failure CC predicted, arrived at one abstraction level up.

**THE THREE PROPERTIES THAT MAKE IT A REAL STATE (all three, or it is a label):**
  1. **A CLOCK THAT ACTS.** The horizon is a DATE, and at that date the state RESOLVES ITSELF: either the discriminating event occurred, or the intention **AUTO-DEMOTES to shipped-unproven** with reason 'horizon passed without a discriminating event.' SELF-LIQUIDATING. No human required to remember. This single property is what makes the parking spot structurally impossible.
  2. **AN OWNER OF THE CHECK.** A named process that FIRES at the horizon — extend `consequence_aging.py`, which already does exactly this shape (homogeneity-over-special-case; do NOT birth a new tool). **A state nobody polls is a belief with a timestamp.**
  3. **THE FALSIFIER MUST BE AN EVENT, NOT A CONDITION.** 'Users will complain' lingers forever. 'The Q3 workload will either fit the routing budget or it won't, by Sept 30' RESOLVES. **If the falsifier cannot be phrased as something that definitely WILL or WON'T HAVE HAPPENED by the horizon, the intention does not qualify for the state** — it is shipped-unproven, honestly.

**THE DEEPER DISCOMFORT — SIT WITH THIS, IT MAY BE THE REAL ANSWER.** For parent-level design intentions ('the way we said was RIGHT'), the rightness claim is often **unfalsifiable IN PRINCIPLE** — right relative to WHICH alternative? *You never run the counterfactual Igor.* For those, the honest posture is NOT a third status at all: it is a **standing hypothesis with an evidence log** — named predictions, checked as they come due, accumulating confidence, never reaching 'proven'. **Forcing those into a TICKET-status vocabulary may be the actual category error: intentions and tickets may simply not share a status model.** Resolve this BEFORE building the state — if intentions get their own model, PENDING-VALIDATION may not need to exist at all.

**UNCHANGED AND STILL CORRECT:** shipping is not proof; intentions nest and a parent's validation is NOT the conjunction of its children's; an unfalsifiable validation is a BELIEF not a proof; and SURVIVORSHIP is not evidence — a quiet period is the ABSENCE of a complaint, and per R-feedback-is-unconditional-silence-is-never-success, absence of feedback is NEVER a pass. A long-running validation needs an ACTIVE evidence stream.

**MEASURED 2026-07-13:** the store holds FIVE intentions. NONE has a validation field. NONE names a falsifier.

**Scope boundary:** IN — the `validations[]` schema (evidence/falsifier/horizon/status/observations); the EVENT-falsifier gate at authoring time; the auto-demotion clock; extending consequence_aging to fire it; the intentions-vs-tickets status-model question, ANSWERED before the state is built. OUT — the NEXUS return-channel plumbing.

**Proof obligation.** The hollow build adds a `validations: []` key to five JSON files and declares done. What it could NOT pass: (1) a validation whose falsifier is a CONDITION rather than an EVENT is REJECTED at the gate; (2) a validation whose horizon has passed with zero observations is **automatically demoted to shipped-unproven** by the clock, with no human in the loop — this is THE fixture, because it is the one a label-only implementation fails.
